title: BetterVanillaBuilding-Datapack
description: The datapack needed to craft BetterVanillaBuilding or Stefan's Armors'N'Items items.
body:
# BetterVanillaBuilding Datapack
**Download from the [official website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/):**
- Download all editions
- Download addon versions
- See all pack features

## What is this datapack?
Want to enjoy [BetterVanillaBuilding](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/download120) and [Stefan's Armors'N'Items]([https://bettervanillabuilding.com/armorsnitemsdownload/](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/download120/#packpicker)) without needing mods to make custom items work? **Then you need this datapack!**

This datapack makes my custom items craftable through the stonecutter, as introduced in BetterVanillaBuilding update 3.0.

![3.0](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/update3.0.png)

## How to install:
Installing datapacks goes as follows: 
- Download the datapack from my official sources. 

**(On a new world)**
- When generating a new world, choose "more" in the top menu.
- Click the datapacks button, this opens the datapack screen.
- Drag the downloaded file into this screen.
- Enable the datapack.

**(On an old world)**
- Select your world and choose "edit".
- Click "open world folder".
- In the world folders, find the "datapacks" folder.
- Drag the downloaded file into the datapacks folder.
- Enter your world. The datapack should now be applied.

**(On a server)**
> Get a Minecraft server for 25% off with code stefanj2 on [shockbyte.com](https://shockbyte.com/partner/stefanj2_)
- Find your server files and open the "world" folder.
- Find the "datapacks" folder inside your world files.
- Drag the downloaded file into the datapacks folder.
- Restart your server. The datapack should now be applied.

## Get your own Minecraft Server
[![Shockbyte](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9360084db5b7016f32cdf6978d0ca72c50b5d351.png)](https://shockbyte.com/partner/stefanj2_)
